changes: Added direct link and item highlighting to push notifications
Fixed notifications not being sent to list owner when a subscriber adds items
Improved push notification reliability with proper ObjectId handling
Fixed push notifications not being delivered on smartphones
Fixed service worker not registering in production builds
Ensured push notifications are fully sent before API responses complete
Added User Guide page accessible from the burger menu
Full documentation covering all app features in English, Spanish, and Catalan
Added changelog page accessible from burger menu
Displayed app version in the sidebar
Initial release with basic shopping list functionality
